name: Peanut Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Remove wing tips and cut each wing into two pieces.
3. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients except parsley and lemon juice.
4. Cook over low heat for about 15 minutes until reduced and thickened to the consistency of thick gravy.
5. Place wings in a shallow baking pan and cover with sauce, making sure each is well coated.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley and lemon slices.
